Bronx·NYC Portrait & Editorial

Marcelo
Lopez Lopez

Bronx~NYC based portrait photographer & political creative. Capturing authentic visual stories across The Bronx and the wider New York City area — headshots, portraits, editorial, and creative brand collaborations.

Let's Connect Today → View Portfolio

Est. The Bronx · 15 Years Behind the Lens

Headshots, portraits and editorial photography.

Based in The Bronx, New York City. Available for travel.

Hyper-Local

A photographer of this borough.

Serving all neighborhoods of the Bronx with hyper-local, on-site portrait setups — from the Grand Concourse to the shoreline at Orchard Beach. A full mobile studio comes to your office, gallery, or favorite park.

Grand Concourse Pelham Bay Park Orchard Beach South Bronx Arthur Avenue
The Bronx · Service Area

Let's make something honest

Your story deserves to be photographed well.

Start a project →

Portrait, headshot, editorial & brand photography rooted in The Bronx, New York City. Available for travel.
